name: OWNER-PAYOUTS
epic: owner / property-manager-company model — phase 3 (the money loop: fee + payouts + balance)
summary: Closes the PM-company money loop on top of Phase-101 (owner contact + statement) and Phase-102 (owner login + portal). A per-owner management fee (the PM's cut, deducted on the owner statement only), PM->owner payout records, and a DERIVED owner balance (lifetime statement net − non-voided payouts) — surfaced on a new landlord owner-detail page and a read-only owner-portal payouts page.

findings.title: management fee config + owner-statement net
findings.detail: property_owners.management_fee_type ENUM('none','percentage','flat') default 'none' + management_fee_value decimal(12,2). PropertyOwner::managementFeeOn(collected) computes the fee (percentage of gross collected, clamped at 100% AT THE MODEL so a DB-set value can't drive net negative; or flat; none=>0). OwnerStatementService::forOwner adds management_fee/fee_type/fee_value + net = collected − expenses − fee. forProperty UNCHANGED (feeds the Phase-100 landlord reports — fee is owner-facing only). Store/UpdatePropertyOwnerRequest accept the fee fields (percentage capped 100; prepareForValidation zeroes the value when type=none). Statement PDF/email/portal show the fee line (table foots pre-fee, fee broken out in the Net-to-Owner section). Default 'none' => non-regressive (Phase-100/101/102 statement tests stay green).

findings.title: payout records + derived balance
findings.detail: owner_payouts (landlord_id+property_owner_id cascade, amount decimal(12,2), currency, paid_on, method, reference, notes, voided_at, created_by) — money records VOIDED not hard-deleted. OwnerPayout model (TenantScope+Auditable; scopeActive=whereNull voided_at) + factory + OwnerPayoutPolicy (registered; landlord create/void, caretaker view). StoreOwnerPayoutRequest (amount>=0.01, paid_on, method in-list). OwnerLedgerService::summary = lifetime forOwner net − sum(non-voided payouts) = balance_due (can go negative = advance, surfaced honestly, not blocked). OwnerPayoutController store/void (WithLandlordScope getLandlordId + same-tenant abort_unless on BOTH owner and payout; void idempotent).

findings.title: landlord owner-detail + owner-portal payouts
findings.detail: Owners/Show.vue (finances.owners.show + PropertyOwnerController::show): fee editor (PUT update, fee-only form so it can't wipe other owner fields), balance summary (OwnerLedgerService), record-payout form, payout history with void, properties, statement link, advance note. Owners/Index rows link to Show. Owner/Payouts.vue (owner-portal.payouts + OwnerPortalPayoutsController, read-only, ResolvesCurrentOwner-scoped, excludes voided) + AuthenticatedLayout owner nav 'My Payouts'. Lang en/sw/ar (owners.payouts.* incl methods.*, portal.payouts_title, portal.management_fee, messages.payout_*).

closeout.result: 3/3 findings pass — zero deferrals. Phase 3 of the owner / PM-company model: the money loop (management fee + PM->owner payouts + a derived owner balance).
closeout.summary: Closes the PM-company money loop on Phase-101 (owner contact + statement) + Phase-102 (owner login + portal). (1) A per-owner MANAGEMENT FEE: property_owners.management_fee_type ENUM(none/percentage/flat) + management_fee_value decimal(12,2); PropertyOwner::managementFeeOn(collected) clamps a percentage at 100% AT THE MODEL (not just the request) so no path drives net negative; OwnerStatementService::forOwner deducts it (net = collected − expenses − fee) while forProperty stays fee-free (Phase-100 reports non-regressive); default 'none' keeps every prior statement test green. (2) PAYOUTS: owner_payouts (voided not hard-deleted) + OwnerPayout model/factory/OwnerPayoutPolicy(registered)/StoreOwnerPayoutRequest + OwnerPayoutController store/void (WithLandlordScope + same-tenant abort_unless on BOTH owner and payout; void idempotent). (3) DERIVED BALANCE: OwnerLedgerService::summary = lifetime forOwner net − sum(non-voided payouts) = balance_due (negative = advance, surfaced not blocked). (4) SURFACES: landlord Owners/Show.vue (fee editor + balance + record/void payouts + history) + read-only owner-portal Owner/Payouts.vue (ResolvesCurrentOwner-scoped) + nav + lang en/sw/ar.
closeout.review: Full 3-agent multi-reviewer pass (CodeRabbit + pr-review code-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter) — all three executed for real (49/48/24 tool-uses, cited line numbers). Convergent verdict: NO CRITICAL/HIGH isolation or non-regression defects — confirmed + tested: owner/landlord isolation (every owner_payouts query binds BOTH landlord_id AND property_owner_id; portal scope from ResolvesCurrentOwner auth-derived, never a route param; foreign-owner record/void denied), forProperty stays fee-free (Phase-100 reports), default no-fee non-regression, void-not-delete + voided excluded from balance, over-pay allowed as honest negative balance. FIXED: the management-fee blade line used an inline @if-inside-text that broke Blade compilation → 3 PDF-download renders 500'd (caught by the 100/101/102 regression, NOT the Phase-103 tests which don't render the PDF) → rewritten as a ternary echo in both the PDF + email blades; percentage cap moved into managementFeeOn() (model chokepoint) so a seeder/import value can't go negative; fee_type=none now zeroes the stale value via prepareForValidation on both requests; DROPPED the snapshot_*/period_* columns + the controller resolveRange — they were write-only, never read, and always captured a misleading trailing-12-month window (a payout is just money sent; the balance derives from the live statement); added the advance note to the landlord Show page for parity with the portal. FALSE POSITIVE dismissed with evidence: the "currencySymbol prop ignored → wrong currency" flag — formatMoney already resolves the landlord currency from the Inertia sharedCurrencyCode (useFormatters.ts:111), so money renders correctly (the prop is redundant, matching the Phase-102 pattern). Single-currency-per-landlord is the domain invariant (the statement aggregate itself sums payments without a currency filter) — payout sums follow the same convention.
closeout.tests: Phase103OwnerPayoutsTest 16 (fee helper percentage/flat/none + forOwner net w/ percentage fee + forProperty net UNCHANGED + default-no-fee; record payout + void excludes-from-balance + void idempotent no-op + foreign-owner-record-denied[403/404] + tenant-cannot-record[403]; balance = lifetime net − non-voided payouts + over-pay negative; landlord Show renders balance + foreign-owner-show-denied; portal owner-sees-only-own[scoping isolation] + excludes-voided + non-owner-403). Non-regression GREEN: Phase100ReportsDepth 12 + Phase101OwnerFoundation 10 + Phase102OwnerPortal 19 = 57 passed / 170 assertions with Phase-103 in place (the blade fix restored the 3 PDF renders). Gates: Pint 20 files, eslint 0 errors, nav-audit clean (owner-portal.payouts nav-linked), check-import-case/exists OK, vite build exit 0, lang parity en/sw/ar owners.php 94 keys each. Two new migrations -> dev DB migrated.
closeout.constraints_preserved: Management fee is OWNER-FACING only (forOwner) — never reduces the landlord's own per-property report (forProperty / Phase-100). Default fee_type=none => 0 (non-regressive). Percentage clamped at 100% at the model. Owner balance is DERIVED on demand (no stored ledger to drift): lifetime statement net − non-voided payouts. Payouts are VOIDED (voided_at), never hard-deleted; voided excluded from balance + portal. Over-payment ALLOWED (advance) and surfaced honestly, never blocked. Single-currency per landlord (matches the statement aggregate). Every owner-money query explicitly landlord-scoped + same-tenant abort_unless (defense-in-depth over TenantScope); the owner portal scopes only from auth (ResolvesCurrentOwner), never a route param. Deferred: owner payout RECEIPTS/PDF + emailed remittance advice; %-share / multi-owner-per-property; true multi-currency owner accounting; the dashboard metrics N+1 batching (from Phase 102).
